features: ★ Maximum Power – Allmax AAA Maximum Power Alkaline Batteries are premium-grade batteries built with high-quality components and EnergyCircle Technology to supply maximum power to your electronic devices.

★ Ultra Long-Lasting – Allmax AAA batteries are considered “ultra long-lasting” and have been independently tested to outperform standard alkaline batteries. This means you can expect Allmax batteries to last longer.

★ Leakproof Design – Allmax AAA batteries are designed to seal in materials and protect your electronic devices. This means Allmax batteries are perfect for daily household or business use, and perfect for your family’s needs.

★ Longest Shelf Life – Allmax AAA batteries are always fresh and maintain power for up to 10 years in proper storage. This makes Allmax batteries the perfect choice for long-term storage and emergency preparedness kits.

★ Maximum Performance – Allmax AAA batteries are trusted by families, schools, businesses, hospitals, and government institutions around the world for long-lasting performance and reliability. Allmax AAA batteries are compatible with a wide range of high-drain and low-drain electronic devices, including remote controls, flashlights, toys, wireless mice, wireless keyboards, clocks, flameless candles, LED lights, toothbrushes, digital cameras, radios, fire sticks, traffic wands, noise meters, headlamps, blood pressure monitors, golf launch monitors, shooting earmuffs, shavers, CD players, wireless headsets, game consoles, and more!

etc. Common Questions: Are Allmax alkaline batteries rechargeable? No, Allmax alkaline batteries are not rechargeable. Do not attempt to recharge standard alkaline batteries, as this may cause leakage or explosion. Where can I find the expiration date? You can find the expiration date on the body of the battery or on the box. It is marked with a "Best Before" date. Our Allmax AAA Alkaline battery has a 10-year shelf life, meaning under proper storage conditions you can use it any time before this date. Will the battery fit in my device? They usually do. For example, the height of our AAA Alkaline batteries is 1.74 inches with an outer diameter of 0.40 inches. This conforms to IEC standards. So if the size of your battery compartment is designed to IEC standards, our batteries will fit. How are Allmax batteries packaged and how to open the packaging? There are 4 Allmax AAA Alkaline batteries tightly wrapped in plastic shrink packs, with 12 shrink packs per package that are well-packed in boxes that are easy to open, easy to stock, reclosable, and impact-resistant, so your batteries are always protected. To open the packaging, simply use your fingernail to crease the middle of the plastic shrink pack or use a safe household device to crease the middle of the plastic, and then bend the shrink pack to open and access the batteries. If you have any further questions, please contact our support department so that we can assist you further. Can I store batteries in the refrigerator? It is not a good idea to store batteries in the refrigerator. It is best to store batteries in a cool, dry place. We DO NOT recommend storing batteries in the fridge. This does not lengthen battery life. For safety reasons, please keep batteries away from children and from extreme temperatures, hot or cold. Do not freeze batteries, and do not expose batteries to fire. Extreme temperatures may cause batteries to explode or may lead to harmful outcomes. Are batteries affected by temperature? Extreme high or low temperature is not good for batteries. DO NOT use or store batteries at high or low temperature. Low temperature may cause battery discharge capacity to drop, while high temperature may lead to battery leakage. What should I pay attention to during use? Before use, remove any protective film from the battery and ensure the positive and negative terminals in the battery compartment are clean and free of dirt or rust. Do not mix old and new batteries, or combine batteries of different types or brands. How can I track the status of my order? If you have any questions or concerns about the delivery or status of your order, please contact Amazon through their website or by calling their toll-free number. Together we work to ensure your batteries are delivered on time and they are in perfect condition. What if I receive a broken or defective product? If your box or product is damaged in any way, please contact Amazon. Amazon is responsible for delivering our products, so they will take care of your order. If you need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach us through Amazon. Our information is easily accessible.
